name: City National Bank of West Virginia
description_short: Full-service regional bank headquartered in Charleston, WV, serving consumers and businesses across four states with 95+ locations. Offers checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and wealth management.
description_long: City National Bank has been operating for more than 65 years and is headquartered in Charleston, West Virginia. The bank serves a multi-state region including West Virginia, Kentucky, Virginia, and Ohio with more than 95 branch locations. As a community-focused regional bank, City National Bank positions itself as a locally-rooted financial institution with ties to the communities it serves. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business banking products including checking and savings accounts, personal and business loans, credit cards, mortgages, home equity loans and lines of credit, cash management services, and wealth management advisory. Their wealth management division serves clients with investment management, retirement planning, and trust and estate services, with options for accounts starting at $25,000. They provide remote deposit, merchant services, and multiple digital channels including mobile banking apps for iOS and Android. City National Bank distinguishes itself through customer satisfaction rankings and regional recognition. The bank has been ranked #1 for retail banking customer satisfaction in the North Central region for six times in the last nine years according to J.D. Power studies. In 2024, the bank ranked #8 overall nationally and #5 among banks with $5B-$50B in assets in Bank Director's RankingBanking Report. The institution describes itself as a nationally recognized leader in community banking with emphasis on local community support through the "City Cares" initiative. As a regional bank, City National Bank operates within a specific geographic footprint and asset range, which may limit accessibility for consumers outside its service area. While the bank emphasizes customer service recognition and comprehensive banking services, customers should verify product availability and terms specific to their location and financial needs.
services: Mortgages and home equity loans and lines of credit
Wealth management and investment advisory services
pros: Ranked #1 for retail banking customer satisfaction in North Central region six times in nine years per J.D. Power studies
Over 95 branch locations across four states (WV, KY, VA, OH) for in-person banking access
Comprehensive wealth management services including retirement planning, investment management, and trust/estate services
Full-service banking with personal/business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, home equity products, and credit cards
Mobile banking apps available for iOS and Android with remote deposit capabilities
Established institution with 65+ years of operating history
Multiple specialized login services including cash management, merchant services, and trust services
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to West Virginia, Kentucky, Virginia, and Ohio only
Wealth management services have $25,000 minimum account requirement, excluding smaller investors
Website does not display current interest rates, APRs, or specific loan terms for any products
No mention of online-only or premium checking account tiers with specific benefits
Limited transparency on fee structures for checking accounts, loans, or other services
best_for: Consumers and small business owners in West Virginia, Kentucky, Virginia, or Ohio seeking local branch access
Individuals with $25,000+ seeking personalized wealth management and investment advisory services
Business customers needing cash management and merchant services solutions
Customers prioritizing community-focused banking with established local relationships
diagnosis: City National Bank is best suited for consumers and business customers located in its four-state service area who value established community banking relationships and demonstrated customer service excellence. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank only operates in West Virginia, Kentucky, Virginia, and Ohio, making it inaccessible for customers outside these states; additionally, specific product terms and rates are not disclosed online, requiring customers to contact branches or visit in person for pricing details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Full-service regional bank headquartered in Charleston, WV serving four states with comprehensive banking services.
fdic_official_name: City National Bank of West Virginia
